title: An astrophysicist's take on the government's UAP files: 'Just more fuzzy blob videos'
description: NPR's Scott Detrow talks with astrophysicist Adam Frank about the government's release of files related to Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena.

title: Sherriff Nanos' fate decided; UAP files released | FOX 10 Talks
description: The fate of Sheriff Chris Nanos, the point man in the Nancy Guthrie investigation, was revealed during a Pima County Board of Supervisors hearing. Plus, FOX 10 Executive Producer Trenton Hooker previews a new episode of “Unknown” diving into unexplained phenomena.

title: Reform councillor calls for UFO committee as baffled punters ask 'what you on about'
description: A new Reform councillor has called for the establishment of a UFO committee to assess aviation safety concerns as a UK airport prepares to reopen

title: Oregon UFO Festival turns 26. Schedule, events, things to do this year
description: One of the largest UFO festivals in the U.S. is almost here as alien enthusiasts get ready to come together and celebrate in downtown McMinnville.

title: Top-secret Air Force jet spotted near Area 51 just days after UFO disclosure
description: A top-secret Air Force jet has been spotted at one of the most classified military bases tied to UFOs just days after the first files on alien contact went public.
